revision.comment: Merged
revision.text: {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Wrap]]」の保護設定を変更しました: [[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: 用途と使用法は[[Template:Nowrap begin]]を参照 [[Category:レイアウト用テンプレート|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 16:00:57
revision.text: This template works together with [[Template:Nowrap begin|{{nowrap begin}}]]. See explanation there. [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: {{pp-semi-template}}
revision.text: {{pp-semi-template}} This template works together with [[Template:Nowrap begin|{{nowrap begin}}]]. See explanation there. [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: pp-semi-template -> small=yes (Set to small padlock.)
revision.text: {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} This template works together with [[Template:Nowrap begin|{{nowrap begin}}]]. See explanation there. [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Added a normal collapsible wrapping space between the span tags. According to my testing it should work better in some cases then and no difference in the other cases.
revision.text: {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} This template works together with [[Template:Nowrap begin|{{nowrap begin}}]]. See explanation there. [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Robot - Speedily moving category Formatting templates to Wikipedia formatting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]].
revision.text: {{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} This template works together with [[Template:Nowrap begin|{{nowrap begin}}]]. See explanation there. [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Changed to {{pp-template|small=yes}} since now fully protected. Moved documentation and category to /doc subpage.
revision.text: {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: remove {{pp-template}} since included in {{documentation}}
revision.text: {{documentation}}

revision.comment: use entity
revision.text: {{documentation}}

revision.comment: use nowrap class
revision.text: {{documentation}}

revision.comment: the previous construction could lead to misnesting of elements; consider e.g. {{nowrap|<u>...{{wrap}}...</u>}}
revision.text: {{documentation}}

revision.comment: allow something else to put in it
revision.text: {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Listed for merging with [[:Template:Allow wrap]]; see [[:Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 April 26#Template:Wrap]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Wrap|otherpage=Allow wrap|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 April 27#Template:Wrap|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Twinkle put the wrong date on?
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Wrap|otherpage=Allow wrap|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 April 26#Template:Wrap|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: noinclude must precede "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Wrap|otherpage=Allow wrap|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 April 26#Template:Wrap|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: fix date
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Wrap|otherpage=Allow wrap|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 April 27#Template:Wrap|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}} {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{{1| }}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
